PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/ru/payment" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 40; $html = $r.Content; $checks = 'Order.checkout','Оформление заказа','Ваши контактные данные','Order.afterPay','автоматически появится'; foreach\($c in $checks\){ "{0,-28} {1}" -f $c, \($\(if\($html -match [regex]::Escape\($c\)\){'FOUND'}else{'-'}\)\) } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Get-Command ngrok \(всі\) ==="; Get-Command ngrok -All -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== where.exe ngrok ==="; where.exe ngrok 2>&1; Write-Output "=== реальні exe ==="; @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\ngrok\\ngrok.exe","$env:ProgramData\\chocolatey\\lib\\ngrok\\tools\\ngrok.exe","$env:ProgramData\\chocolatey\\bin\\ngrok.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\shims\\ngrok.exe","C:\\ngrok\\ngrok.exe"\) | ForEach-Object { "{0}  ->  {1}" -f $_, \(Test-Path $_\) })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Пошук ngrok.exe на дисках \(швидкі типові місця\) ==="; $cands = @\(\); $roots = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA","$env:APPDATA","$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads","$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop","$env:USERPROFILE\\OneDrive","$env:ProgramFiles","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}","C:\\tools","C:\\"\) ; foreach \($r in $roots\) { if \(Test-Path $r\) { try { Get-ChildItem -Path $r -Filter ngrok.exe -Recurse -Depth 4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Force | ForEach-Object { $cands += $_.FullName } } catch {} } }; $cands | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { $v = \(& $_ version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1\); "{0}   [{1}]" -f $_, $v }; Write-Output "=== ngrok config / authtoken ==="; @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\ngrok\\ngrok.yml","$env:USERPROFILE\\.ngrok2\\ngrok.yml","$env:APPDATA\\ngrok\\ngrok.yml"\) | ForEach-Object { "{0}  ->  {1}" -f $_, \(Test-Path $_\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/ru/payment" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $html=$r.Content; foreach\($c in 'Оформление заказа','vendor-chunks','Server Error','Cannot find module'\){ if\($html -match [regex]::Escape\($c\)\){ "FOUND: $c" } } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Хто слухає :3000 і :3001 ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "{0}  PID {1}  {2}" -f $_.LocalPort, $_.OwningProcess, $p.ProcessName }; Write-Output "=== ngrok-процеси ==="; Get-Process ngrok -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== ngrok version ==="; ngrok version 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { $t = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels" -TimeoutSec 5; if \($t.tunnels\) { $t.tunnels | Select-Object public_url, @{n='addr';e={$_.config.addr}} | Format-List } else { "тунель online, але ще не створено forwarding" } } catch { "API 4040 недоступний: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $body = @{ orderReference='test-9c65-01'; productId='20242'; productName='Test'; orderDate=1700000000000; locale='ru' } | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/ru/api/createorder" -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -TimeoutSec 30; $r | Select-Object merchantDomainName, amount, serviceUrl, @{n='sig';e={$_.signature.Substring\(0,12\)+'...'}} | Format-List } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })
